meta.title: RegEngine — API-First Regulatory Compliance
meta.description: FSMA 204 compliance platform. Ingest, verify, and export traceability records with cryptographic proof.

hero.title: The FDA gives you 24 hours.
hero.subtitle: RegEngine connects your suppliers, lots, and traceability events into one auditable record — so when the FDA or Walmart asks, you respond in minutes.

auditCard.body: Provide complete chain of custody for Romaine Lettuce Lot R-2026-0312 from farm to distribution center. Due by end of business Friday.
